tasks.description: Establish a Standard Schema-first core in @crustjs/validate with a new /standard entrypoint and shared runtime contracts
subtasks: Add @standard-schema/spec to packages/validate as the canonical runtime contract dependency and update package exports for ./standard
Create packages/validate/src/standard/index.ts and supporting modules for Standard Schema type guards and schema execution helpers
Define provider-agnostic runtime result contracts for success/failure that align with existing ValidationIssue normalization
Implement Standard Schema issue-to-ValidationIssue normalization that handles root paths, nested paths, and array indices
Add unit tests for Standard Schema guards, execution helpers, and path normalization edge cases in packages/validate/src/standard/*.test.ts
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/validate run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: Reference .ralph/SPEC.md: Standard Schema is the universal runtime contract. Keep this task focused on shared runtime core only; do not refactor zod/effect command code yet.

tasks.description: Refactor command validation runtime to use the Standard Schema core while keeping provider-specific command DSL ergonomics
subtasks: Introduce a shared command validation runner in @crustjs/validate that consumes a generic validate(schema, value) contract from the standard core
Update packages/validate/src/zod/withZod.ts to delegate schema execution and issue handling to the shared Standard Schema-backed runtime
Update packages/validate/src/effect/withEffect.ts to delegate schema execution and issue handling to the shared Standard Schema-backed runtime
Keep existing command APIs available (withZod/withEffect) but remove duplicated provider-specific issue mapping logic
Extend command validation tests to assert unchanged behavior for transformed values, variadic args, plugin-injected flags, and formatted errors
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/validate run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: Completed. Both providers now delegate to validateStandard() from standard core. ValidationResult unified. Effect uses standardSchemaV1() wrapper. All 168 tests pass unchanged.

tasks.description: Add first-class prompt validation adapters in @crustjs/validate/standard with consistent error rendering and async support
subtasks: Implement standard prompt adapter API that converts a Standard Schema schema into @crustjs/prompts ValidateFn-compatible functions
Support sync and async schema validation transparently and map failures to user-facing prompt error messages
Provide configurable prompt error strategy (first issue message vs rendered multi-issue message) with sensible defaults
Add focused unit tests for prompt adapters covering success, single failure, multiple issues, async validation, and root-level errors
Export prompt adapter from packages/validate/src/standard/index.ts
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/validate run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: Prompt integration must not require changes to @crustjs/prompts internals. The adapter should fit the existing ValidateFn<T> contract from packages/prompts/src/core/types.ts. Use validateStandard() from standard/validate.ts for schema execution — it handles both sync and async schemas and returns normalized ValidationResult.

tasks.description: Add typed prompt parsing helpers for schema-transformed prompt outputs to improve end-to-end DX
subtasks: Design and implement typed helper APIs in @crustjs/validate/standard for parsing prompt answers into schema output types
Expose helper overloads that support direct value parsing and prompt-integrated parsing workflows
Ensure helper APIs surface normalized validation errors and preserve transformed output types from schemas
Add type-level and runtime tests for transformed schemas, optional/default schemas, and async schemas
Add provider wrapper exports in zod/effect entrypoints that forward typed prompt parsing helpers
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/validate run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: This task is separate from ValidateFn adapter behavior. Focus on strongly typed output-oriented DX for prompt workflows.

tasks.description: Introduce store validation contract in @crustjs/store and enforce strict validation on both read and write paths by default
subtasks: Extend CreateStoreOptions in packages/store/src/types.ts with a generic validator contract for full config objects
Apply validator execution in createStore write/update paths before persistence
Apply validator execution in read path after defaults merge and before returning effective config
Add or extend store error modeling to represent validation failures with structured issues and clear error code semantics
Add comprehensive tests in packages/store/src/store.test.ts and related files for valid/invalid read, write, update, and reset flows
Update store public exports in packages/store/src/index.ts for new validator-related types or errors
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/store test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/store run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: Per SPEC constraints, store validation is strict by default and must fail loudly for invalid persisted config. Keep @crustjs/store provider-agnostic and avoid hard dependency on zod/effect.

tasks.description: Implement Standard Schema store adapters in @crustjs/validate and expose provider wrappers for zod/effect
subtasks: Create store adapter API in packages/validate/src/standard that returns @crustjs/store-compatible validator functions
Ensure adapter output uses shared ValidationIssue normalization and consistent validation error semantics
Add zod and effect wrapper exports that delegate to standard store adapters
Add integration tests in packages/validate for store adapter behavior against valid configs, invalid configs, and transformed output
Verify compatibility with @crustjs/store strict read/write validation lifecycle
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/validate run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: This task implements adapters only; store core contract work belongs to the previous task. Keep boundaries clear to avoid overlapping file ownership. Use validateStandard()/validateStandardSync() from standard/validate.ts for schema execution. For Effect schemas, wrap with standardSchemaV1() before passing to validateStandard().

tasks.description: Unify command arg/flag schema DX by adding explicit parser metadata fallback when schema introspection is ambiguous
subtasks: Define explicit metadata options for command arg/flag helpers in zod/effect schema DSL to override inferred parser shape when needed
Implement metadata override handling in packages/validate/src/zod/schema.ts and packages/validate/src/effect/schema.ts
Ensure runtime definition errors remain clear when schema and explicit parser metadata conflict
Expand command DSL tests for ambiguous schema scenarios and explicit metadata override behavior
Document precedence rules between inferred schema metadata and explicit overrides in code comments/tests
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test
Run type checks with bun --cwd packages/validate run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: Standard Schema does not fully solve parser-shape inference for all providers. This fallback keeps command DX robust and universal-ready.

tasks.description: Publish unified API surface and documentation for standard, zod, and effect entrypoints across command/prompt/store workflows
subtasks: Update packages/validate/README.md with a target matrix (command, prompt, store) and Standard Schema-first architecture guidance
Add concrete usage examples for @crustjs/validate/standard, @crustjs/validate/zod, and @crustjs/validate/effect covering all targets
Update packages/store/README.md to replace future-validation wording with implemented validation integration patterns
Ensure package exports and type exports are fully documented and tested for scaffold/import coverage
Add regression tests for entrypoint importability and public API type exports where needed
Run package tests with bun --cwd packages/validate test && bun --cwd packages/store test
Run monorepo type checks with bun run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: Documentation should optimize for DX-first onboarding: one schema mental model across all targets. Keep examples aligned with new strict store behavior and prompt adapters.

tasks.description: Add cross-package integration coverage to verify consistent validation semantics across command, prompt, and store
subtasks: Create integration tests that exercise one shared schema across command handler validation, prompt validation, and store validation
Assert consistent issue path formatting and message rendering across all targets
Assert consistent handling for root-level issues, nested object paths, arrays, and transformed outputs
Add separate sync and async coverage where provider behavior differs
Run monorepo test suite with bun run test
Run monorepo type checks with bun run check:types
Run monorepo lint/format checks with bun run check
tasks.notes: This is the final confidence task and should run after all feature tasks complete. Keep tests stable and avoid relying on terminal-interactive behavior.
